action.reasoning: Observation: v12 reactive yields near-zero safe_steps (avg 1.8, max 9<<500), detector_on~18/750, avg_dist stuck at 5.0, success=0. Some episodes reach min_dist<1m but lose lock immediately (max_streak=9). Config confirms exact thresholds (500 accumulated steps in [1,2)m with |angle|<0.2618rad). Analysis: OA logic triggers on human (depth sees humanoid as obstacle when detector>0.5), causing premature turns away; follow-mode gains/speed-matching insufficient for persistent tracking of random-walking oracle; myopic reactive cannot maintain long streaks needed. Root cause: no detector-conditioned OA + weak in-range stabilization. Literature SPF underperformed due to navmesh/dynamic-goal issues in this task. Decision: update to v13 reactive in test_full_episode.py+predict.py+train.py (dedicated detector>0.5 branch for stable follow at ~0.35 vel + strong facing -8*angle when roughly aligned; OA ONLY if detector<0.5; higher pure-rotate threshold; tuned seek/follow gains; improved depth min with positive values; per-epi streak tracking). Run test_full_episode.py to validate gains in safe_steps/streak/detector before submit_eval on improved predict.py (dummy ckpt).
